temporal_description: A group of people, mostly men in light blue, short-sleeved collared shirts, stand in a dimly lit office, all facing a television screen mounted on a far wall. The office has a modern, corporate feel with glass partitions, desks, and filing cabinets. A large, dark pendant light hangs from the ceiling. In the top left corner of the frame, white Chinese characters are visible. The camera is positioned at a medium distance, capturing the backs of the onlookers and the overall atmosphere of the room. The audio features a female narrator speaking in a serious and informative tone, characteristic of a news report. Her voice is steady and clear as she delivers the information. In the background, a subtle, low-key, and slightly tense musical score plays, creating a mood of seriousness and anticipation. The narrator states, "不明凶徒，警察和市民受伤。警方证实其中一名死者的身份是..." which translates to "The unidentified assailant, police, and citizens were injured. The police have confirmed the identity of one of the deceased is..." The audio cuts off before she can finish the sentence. The camera angle shifts to a close-up, over-the-shoulder perspective, focusing on a man in a dark blue shirt in the foreground. In the background, the group of people from the previous shot is visible, their faces showing concern and attentiveness as they watch the screen. A man in a black shirt with an ID badge around his neck stands prominently in the mid-ground, looking forward with a serious expression. The white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner. The camera remains steady, maintaining the close-up, over-the-shoulder view.
